current_problem: No shared vocabulary defines root, legacy, run, durable, and module-source roles.
proposed_change: Publish a repo directory policy and role glossary in docs/governance.

current_problem: New maintenance outputs can still land at the root or ad hoc folders.
proposed_change: Adopt a no-new-root-outputs rule except for approved repo metadata files.
notes: Can start immediately without moving existing files.

current_problem: Legacy areas do not have a common write-closed contract.
proposed_change: Mark results_old/, tables_old/, archive/, _legacy/, Aging old/, and tmp_root_cleanup_quarantine/ as write-closed legacy namespaces.
affected_paths: results_old; tables_old; archive; _legacy; Aging old; tmp_root_cleanup_quarantine

current_problem: Source and artifact layers use different module names such as MT ver2 vs results/mt.
proposed_change: Create a documented module alias registry for source folder names versus artifact folder names.
affected_paths: MT ver2; results/mt; Switching ver12; results/switching
notes: Needed before any migration or automation rewrite.

current_problem: Run folders contain snapshots but there is no formal run container contract.
proposed_change: Define the required contents and naming of results/<module>/runs/<run_id>/.
notes: Should specify manifest, logs, and snapshot semantics.

current_problem: Durable artifact families do not have a clear promotion rule.
proposed_change: Define promotion rules from run outputs to tables/, reports/, and figures/.

current_problem: Maintenance audit outputs are scattered across root and legacy folders.
proposed_change: Route all future repo-health outputs to reports/maintenance and tables/maintenance_*.csv.
notes: This audit already follows the target pattern.

current_problem: Transient logs and probes are spread across root, logs, tmp, and probe_outputs.
proposed_change: Redirect future transient execution evidence into results/<module>/runs or results/maintenance/runs.
notes: Safe if applied only to new writes.

proposed_change: For new outputs, publish durable aging figures to figures/aging and leave run-only images in results/aging/runs/<run_id>/figures.
notes: Do not back-migrate historical figures yet.

current_problem: analysis/ mixes shared code with knowledge CSVs and logs.
proposed_change: Split future analysis knowledge artifacts from reusable code by policy, then selectively migrate low-risk files.

current_problem: reports/ and tables/ contain source-like files.
proposed_change: Inventory source-like files in artifact namespaces and reassign only after lineage and consumer checks.
notes: Snapshots may intentionally stay if declared immutable.

current_problem: tools/ and scripts/ overlap in purpose.
proposed_change: Assign each existing helper to tools/ reusable infrastructure or scripts/ stable entrypoints and stop mixed placement for new files.
blocked_by: Need maintainers to decide the reusable-vs-entrypoint split for some files.
notes: Can start with an ownership catalog.

current_problem: The root is overloaded with run_*.m, logs, csvs, and markdown audits.
proposed_change: Inventory root files and map each to scripts/, docs/, reports/, tables/, or results for future relocation.
blocked_by: Need code-reference and lineage review, especially for root run_*.m entrypoints.

current_problem: Historical source trees use versioned names and divergent layouts.
proposed_change: Consider physical source-folder normalization only after code-reference audits and stable alias mapping are complete.
affected_paths: MT ver2; Relaxation ver3; Switching ver12; other versioned source roots
blocked_by: Blocked by unknown path references and historical scripts.

current_problem: Third-party assets are not isolated from first-party code naming.
proposed_change: Evaluate a future vendor/ or external/ namespace for github_repo after license and reference checks.
notes: Low priority compared with run/output governance.
